title: Что это в reported
description: Распредели reported-предложения по четырём типам исходной речи: statement, yes/no question, wh-question, imperative.

items.explain: said + (that) + S + V — пересказ утверждения «I am tired».

items.text: She asked if I had finished.
items.explain: asked + if + S + V — пересказ yes/no question «Have you finished?».
told + obj + to + V — пересказ приказа «Wait».
asked + wh-word + S + V — пересказ wh-question «Where do you live?».

items.text: She said she would come the next day.
items.explain: said + S + would V — пересказ утверждения «I will come tomorrow».

items.text: He asked whether we were going.
items.explain: asked + whether + S + V — пересказ yes/no question «Are you going?».

items.text: Dad told me not to be late.
items.explain: told + obj + not to + V — пересказ отрицательного приказа «Don't be late».

items.text: The teacher asked why we hadn't done the homework.
items.explain: asked + why + S + V — пересказ wh-question «Why haven't you done the homework?».

items.text: She said she had been working all day.
items.explain: said + S + had been + V-ing — пересказ «I have been working all day».

items.text: He asked when the meeting would start.
items.explain: asked + when + S + V — пересказ «When will the meeting start?».

items.text: She advised me to see a doctor.
items.explain: advised + obj + to + V — пересказ совета «You should see a doctor» / «See a doctor».

items.text: He asked if I could help him.
items.explain: asked + if + S + V — пересказ «Can you help me?». can → could.
